comment.body:
Love how you encapsulate basics just in that one phrase. I sat out of 0dte shenanigans today sadly, opting for a longer duration long bet. Closed regardless to catch some of that insane wave and thankful for your guidance :)

Also I just wanted to add that I'm really new to math and I still struggle with the concepts you put out. But my training is in geopol and I think your weekly post today was truly such a useful primer for those with no background in trade - much better than many college profs and international trade/finance textbooks - what a time to be alive for practitioners and students heh (even better if you're a market participant under Alma's wing :P)
